mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon(merchant_id, name, type, min_amount, discount, reduce_price, total, used, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{minAmount}, #{discount}, #{reducePrice}, #{total}, #{used}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET name=#{name}, type=#{type}, min_amount=#{minAmount}, discount=#{discount}, reduce_price=#{reducePrice}, total=#{total}, used=#{used}, start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
